title: astragalus belangeri
intro: Astragalus belangeri, also known as milk vetch or white milk vetch, is a perennial legume plant native to North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that have been traditionally used to enhance immune function and reduce stress. The health benefits of Astragalus belangeri include its potential to reduce fatigue, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the body's natural defenses against infection. Astragalus belangeri is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and can also be added to soups or other culinary dishes for its nutritional and medicinal benefits.
